notes: post_lo_5 / post_hi_95 use *marginal* posterior quantiles per calibrated param — NOT joint quantiles; if calib params are correlated in the posterior, the joint tail is not exactly at these points. Treat as an 'envelope' rather than a joint probability statement.
SS316_scale=1.0 is the training-data nominal value; HF pipeline still takes a 9-dim input. bnn0414 INPUT_COLS has 8 dims (SS316_scale dropped because it was fixed in training).
Non-calibrated params (E_slope, nu, SS316_T_ref, SS316_alpha) are taken from the test-split true values, so any y_HF deviation from y_true is attributable to calibration of the 4 MCMC params.
